feed.title: ZhgChgLi (Harry Li)
feed.subtitle: An iOS, web, and automation developer from Taiwan 🇹🇼 who also loves sharing, traveling, and writing.

entry.title: CI/CD 實戰指南（二）：GitHub Actions 與 Self-hosted Runner 使用與建置大全

link.title: CI/CD 實戰指南（二）：GitHub Actions 與 Self-hosted Runner 使用與建置大全

entry.summary: 帶您從頭了解 GitHub Actions/Self-hosted Runner 運作方式與手把手使用教學。

entry.title: CI/CD Practical Guide (Part 2): Comprehensive Guide to Using and Building GitHub Actions and Self-hosted Runners

link.title: CI/CD Practical Guide (Part 2): Comprehensive Guide to Using and Building GitHub Actions and Self-hosted Runners

entry.summary: A comprehensive introduction to how GitHub Actions and Self-hosted Runners work, along with a step-by-step tutorial.

entry.title: CI/CD 實戰指南（一）：CI/CD 是什麼？如何透過 CI/CD 打造穩定高效的開發團隊？工具選擇？

link.title: CI/CD 實戰指南（一）：CI/CD 是什麼？如何透過 CI/CD 打造穩定高效的開發團隊？工具選擇？

entry.summary: 以 App (iOS) Team 為例，帶您從 0 認識 CI/CD 與導入後能帶來的實質價值。

entry.title: CI/CD Practical Guide (Part 1): What is CI/CD? How to Build a Stable and Efficient Development Team through CI/CD? Tool Selection?

link.title: CI/CD Practical Guide (Part 1): What is CI/CD? How to Build a Stable and Efficient Development Team through CI/CD? Tool Selection?

entry.summary: Using the App (iOS) Team as an example, this guide will introduce you to CI/CD from scratch and the tangible value it can bring after implementation.

entry.title: 通靈筆記 XCode 升級時最好測一下的事…

link.title: 通靈筆記 XCode 升級時最好測一下的事…

entry.summary: 遇到僅在 Build Configuration Release (正式版、線上版)才會出現的幽靈閃退或程式邏輯問題，但是 Debug 安然無恙。
